title: Raccoon Removal in Merrick, NY | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Merrick, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Licensed experts serving Merrick homes. Call for fast service!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Merrick's tree-lined residential neighborhoods, where they seek shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Merrick, from the waterfront areas near Merrick Road to the quiet suburban streets of Merrick Woods. Our humane removal methods ensure raccoons are safely extracted and prevented from returning to your Long Island home.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Merrick and surrounding Nassau County communities for years with licensed, insured technicians who understand Long Island wildlife behavior. We offer same-day emergency service, humane trapping, complete exclusion work, and thorough attic restoration to ensure your Merrick home is protected long-term.
localContext: Merrick's mature oak and maple trees, proximity to Merrick Bay, and well-established homes built in the mid-20th century create ideal conditions for raccoon activity. Properties near Norman J. Levy Park & Preserve and the tree-canopied streets around Merrick Avenue frequently experience raccoon intrusions, especially during spring nesting season.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Merrick?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Merrick typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and extent of damage. A single raccoon removal with basic exclusion starts around $900, while extensive attic cleanup, multiple animals, and structural repairs can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Merrick properties.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Merrick neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common throughout Merrick due to the area's mature trees, proximity to water sources like Merrick Bay and local ponds, and abundance of food from residential garbage and pet food. Neighborhoods with older homes near Merrick Road, around Merrick Woods, and close to Norman J. Levy Park particularly experience frequent raccoon activity in attics, chimneys, and under decks.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Merrick home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for raccoon emergencies in Merrick. The initial trapping can begin immediately, with most raccoons captured within 3-7 days depending on the situation. Complete exclusion work to seal entry points is performed once all animals are removed. If baby raccoons are present during spring months, we use specialized techniques to safely relocate the entire family.

faqs.question: Do you repair raccoon damage in Merrick attics?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide complete attic restoration services for Merrick homes including insulation replacement, contaminated material removal, odor elimination, and sanitization. Raccoons often damage insulation, wiring, and wood structures while leaving behind hazardous droppings. Our team repairs entry points, replaces damaged materials, and restores your attic to safe, clean conditions with proper documentation for insurance claims.
